summary: Static-to-CMS migration testing complete. All 9 static pages successfully removed and content now served dynamically from database. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: 9/9 pages load correctly (4 resource articles, 1 blog post, 3 locations, 1 intelligence feature).

articles_api.GET /api/articles/knx-vs-control4-luxury: PASS - Returns article with 'KNX vs Control4' in title
articles_api.GET /api/articles/architect-automation-g: PASS - Returns article with 'Architect' in title
articles_api.GET /api/articles/best-home-automation-u: PASS - Returns article with 'Best Home' in title
articles_api.GET /api/articles/smart-home-cost-dubai-: PASS - Returns article with 'Cost' in title
articles_api.GET /api/articles/smart-home-guide-dubai: PASS - Returns article with 'Guide Dubai' in title

locations_api.GET /api/locations/palm-jumeirah: PASS - Returns location with 'Palm Jumeirah' name
locations_api.GET /api/locations/emirates-hills: PASS - Returns location with 'Emirates Hills' name
locations_api.GET /api/locations/downtown-dubai: PASS - Returns location with 'Downtown Dubai' name

intelligence_api.GET /api/intelligence/features (staff-ac: PASS - Feature found by slug with 'Staff Accountability' title

frontend_pages./resources/knx-vs-control4-luxury: PASS - Dynamic article page loads, no 404
frontend_pages./locations/palm-jumeirah: PASS - Dynamic location page shows 'Palm Jumeirah' title
frontend_pages./intelligence/staff-accountability: PASS - Shows 'Staff Accountability & Monitoring' title via slug lookup

seed_data_creation: Content seeded into 'articles' collection (5 articles) and 'intelligence_features' collection (staff-accountability). 3 locations already existed in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static-to-CMS migration is complete. 9 static page files were deleted and their content is now served dynamically via [slug] dynamic routes. The intelligence/[id] page now supports slug-based lookup in addition to id lookup (line 62: f.slug === featureId). All dynamic pages use getArticle(slug), fetch from /api/locations/{slug}, or search features by slug client-side.
